description.value:
Receive Medication data MVE building blocks for patient P. XXX_Schut
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_medicatiegegevens_ontvangen_MVE
Original description: KWAL Medicatiegegevens MVE script 1
Receive Medication data MVE resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3060195')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '59366')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '112984')))).where((quantity.value = 112 or quantity.value = 140)).count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3060195')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '59366')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '112984')))).where((quantity.value = 112 or quantity.value = 140)).count() = 2

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '3060195|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (ECANSYA TABLET FILMOMHULD 500MG)
